text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One day, after training and picking up a few
things in the shopping district...

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: There appears to be a raffle stand over here.

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
Step right up and try your luck with our New
Year's raffle! This year's grand prize is a hot
spring vacation for two!

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
First-prize winners get a deluxe carrot hamburger
steak! Second-prize winners get a bushel of
carrots! And third-prize winners can take home a
single carrot!

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
Don't let this opportunity pass you by! Get a
ticket now and spin for your chance to win!

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
I didn't expect to receive a raffle ticket along
with my notebook purchase...
choice_data_list: Do you have time in your schedule?

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
If we increase our walking speed back home,
there should be no problem. Above all...

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
I cannot miss this opportunity for an interesting
story to tell my parents.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
I'm excited to see what this Japanese way of
testing luck in a raffle has in store for me.

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text: What's got your eye, young lady?

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
If we consider what prize would be equivalent in
value with my notebook, then I suppose it would
be the single carrot.

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
Really?! I don't see many folks like you, that's for
sure!

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
I believe luck tests like this are more about
enjoying the experience than the prize. Now, here
I go.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Eishin Flash gives the tumbler a spin with a tense
expression on her face.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A small plastic ball drops from the tumbler's
opening...

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
Holy mackerel! We've got ourselves a grand-prize
winner! Come and get the coupon for your hot
spring vacation! Congratulations!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: You obtained: <itemname>

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: The hot spring vacation!

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: Wahnsinn!

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Thank you... But is this acceptable? Should I
really take it?

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
I'm sure that luck smiled on you today because
you're so humble. Don't just throw that luck away!

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: You're right. I gratefully accept this, then.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: Hehe. Hot springs...

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
I do. In fact, Germany is just as renowned for its
hot springs as Japan.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
The temperature is lower than those here, so it's
possible to spend an entire day relaxing in the
bath.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Unfortunately, I haven't had an opportunity to
visit one since arriving in Japan.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: So... I'm genuinely happy for this.
choice_data_list:
It'll be nice to take it easy and soak in one,
then.

It'll be nice to take it easy and soak in one,
then.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: Take it easy...

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: Trainer, may I entrust you with the coupon?

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Alas, there is no room in my schedule for a hot
spring getaway at present.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Let me think... After everything is finished next
year, I should have enough leeway to go.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
That said, I cannot write it into my schedule in
orange ink as I am now.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Therefore, could you give it back to me once
everything has concluded?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And that's how the hot spring vacation ticket
came into my possession.
choice_data_list: By the way, why orange ink specifically?

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
When it is for something I am looking forward to
in my schedule, I write it in orange.
choice_data_list: Is that part of German culture?

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: No, it is but a habit of mine from early childhood.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
I can tell you are laughing. Is orange a strange
color?
choice_data_list:
No, I just think it's cute how you color code
your schedule.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Please give it a try for yourself sometime. You'll
come to understand how rational this conscious
decision is once you do.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
You must understand—schedules are meant to be
written in minute detail. By categorizing
everything with colors, the information—

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
...Eishin Flash's lecture on the finer points of
schedule-making lasts all the way home.

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
Looks like we have another first-prize winner!
Congratulations! You get one deluxe carrot
hamburger steak!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: You obtained: <itemname>

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: It looks more delicious than I expected...

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
But of course. The dish originated from Germany,
after all!

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Therefore, I feel entitled to critique the flavor.
Let's find out if it is worthy of being called a
"deluxe" hamburger steak.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: A few days later...

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: Munch, munch...

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: ...It is delicious!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She gives Japan's hamburger steaks a perfect
score.

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
We got a second-prize winner! It's your lucky day!
You're going home with a bushel of carrots!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: You obtained: <itemname>

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
...This is truth in advertising, I see. How many
kilograms is this, exactly?

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
Beats me... All I know is the box is jam-packed, so
your guess is as good as mine.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
They completely disregarded their profit margins
with these prizes. Well, I must reciprocate that
goodwill.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
I know just what to do. I shall make Rüblitorte
with these.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
A delicious Swiss carrot cake. The flavor of carrot
in it is rich and scrumptious.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
My parents taught me a recipe for it which
doesn't require butter.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
However, we cannot possibly eat it all ourselves.
So to remedy that...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Flash, the oven's all ready! ♪

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
The batter is also complete. Let's bake four whole
cakes at a time.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Sometime later, Eishin Flash bakes and shares a
bunch of cakes with her dormmates—and they
rave about it for days afterward.

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
Would you lookie here! You've won the third
prize! Here's your carrot!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: You obtained: <itemname>

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: Just what I wanted. What a great result.

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text: You sure are one in a million, young lady...

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Excuse me, but do you know any good recipes for
this carrot?

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
At the moment, I cannot think of one which would
use it in its entirety.

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text: Oh! My ma will know for sure! HEEEY, MAAA!

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: What? Please, you needn't go so far—

text_block_list.name: Female Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
Oh, I heard your question, no worries! You want
to whip up something nice with that carrot, don't
you?

text_block_list.name: Female Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
I just happened to have put a little something
together earlier, so why don't you come on back
and have a taste of it?

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: Wh-what?

text_block_list.name: Female Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
As they say, experience is the best teacher.
Right? Hahaha!

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: What should I do, Trainer?

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: ...Very well. I look forward to your... lesson?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, Eishin Flash receives a heartfelt cooking
lesson from the nice lady.

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
Ohhh, tough luck! Looks like you pulled a blank
one! Take this pack of tissues as a consolation
prize.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: You obtained: <itemname>

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: What a Pechvogel I am...

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: It means "an unlucky person."

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Winning a consolation prize was well within the
realm of possibility.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: Yet despite understanding that fully...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Understanding something and accepting
something is very different. Eishin Flash is clearly
disappointed.
